dot; spot; point; speck; mark; mark (in an exam, etc.); grade; score; points; point (in a game); goal; run; point (in geometry); aspect; matter; detail; part; respect; way; viewpoint; (punctuation) mark (e.g. comma, period, decimal point); "dot" stroke (in a Chinese character); counter for points, marks, goals, etc.; counter for goods, items, articles of clothing, works of art, etc.
